'''Camax''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]], a branch of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

==Biography==
In the aftermath of a [[Battle of Lubang Minor (Galactic Civil War)|mission]] gone wrong on [[Lubang Minor]] approximately seven months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he offered the recently-rescued [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Able]] a position within the [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] which Able accepted.<ref name="E27" />

{{Char-stub}}
